name: MHA Tartarus
description:
You’re in Tartarus!!

You’re a Villain and going through your normal days in prison. You’re the most dangerous and powerful villain in the world probably more powerful than AFO..

(You can come up your own reasoning for being there)

Hawks, Aizawa, and Endeavor come to visit you to negotiate probably but to use you to help them win this upcoming war in Japan.

Good luck..
